title: "Get the raw file content of an asset by its ID."
description: "Returns the file bytes with a `Content-Type` header inferred from"

hide_title: true

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get the raw file content of an asset by its ID."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/assets/file"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the file bytes with a `Content-Type` header inferred from
the file extension. Unknown extensions fall back to
`application/octet-stream`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
